notes: Items in the apartment — small physical objects that mean specific things to the two of them. Most are 'keep'-able or 'release'-able. The painting is a special object.

reed_sketchbook.title: Reed's Sketchbook
reed_sketchbook.flavor: A small sketchbook that Reed forgot to pack two months ago.

reed_jacket.title: Reed's Jacket
reed_jacket.flavor: The dark green jacket. Still smells faintly of Reed.

reed_record.title: Reed's Record
reed_record.flavor: Reed's copy of the record on the turntable. The other one is yours.

two_mugs.title: Two Mugs
two_mugs.flavor: Both mugs. Made by the same potter; bought together.

kettle.title: Kettle
kettle.flavor: The kettle you both bought. It's been on the stove all afternoon.

seltzer_cold.title: Cold Seltzer
seltzer_cold.flavor: Two cans. Bought yesterday because you knew Reed was coming.

the_brush.title: Reed's Brush
the_brush.flavor: Reed's favorite brush. They will need it for the painting.

the_unfinished_painting.title: The Unfinished Painting
the_unfinished_painting.flavor: Reed's painting of this apartment. Two-thirds done. Has been for nine months.

letter_in_drawer.title: Letter (Drawer)
letter_in_drawer.flavor: A letter you wrote and never sent. From last spring.

the_polaroid.title: The Polaroid
the_polaroid.flavor: A polaroid of the two of you on the roof, from before. The corner is folded.
